age_limit.age_details: Dy. Manager: 36 years, Senior Engineer: 32 years
age_limit.details: Deputy Manager (E-IV): Maximum age limit is 36 years. Senior Engineer (E-III): Maximum age limit is 32 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech/M.E/M.Tech in Guidance, Navigation & Control or Aerodynamics & Structure specializations.
qualification.details: Deputy Manager / Senior Engineer (Guidance, Navigation & Control): Qualifications: B.E/B.Tech/M.E/M.Tech in Aerospace/Robotics/Control System Engineering with First Class. Experience: Dy. Manager (E-IV): Minimum 8 years of relevant post qualification Industrial experience (BE/B.TECH) or Minimum 6 years (ME/M.TECH). Senior Engineer (E-III): Minimum 4 years of relevant post qualification Industrial experience (BE/B.TECH) or Minimum 2 years (ME/M.TECH). Deputy Manager / Senior Engineer (Aerodynamics & Structure): Qualifications: B.E/B.Tech/M.E/M.Tech in Aerospace/Mechanical/Aeronautical Engg/Aerodynamics with First Class. Experience: Dy. Manager (E-IV): Minimum 8 years of relevant post qualification Industrial experience (BE/B.TECH) or Minimum 6 years (ME/M.TECH). Senior Engineer (E-III): Minimum 4 years of relevant post qualification Industrial experience (BE/B.TECH) or Minimum 2 years (ME/M.TECH).

vacancy_details.Post Name: Deputy Manager / Senior Engineer (Guidance, Navigation & Control)

salary_details.details: Deputy Manager (E-IV): Rs. 60,000-3%-1,80,000/- Senior Engineer (E-III): Rs. 50,000-3%-1,60,000/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BEL Deputy Manager / Senior Engineer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.bel-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download BEL Deputy Manager / Senior Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BEL Deputy Manager / Senior Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the BEL Deputy Manager / Senior Engineer Recruitment 2026 is 05-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E/B.Tech/M.E/M.Tech degree in specific specializations like Guidance, Navigation & Control or Aerodynamics & Structure, with a First Class, as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Deputy Manager / Senior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Deputy Manager / Senior Engineer positions in Bharat Electronics (BEL) under this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Deputy Manager and Senior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Deputy Manager post is 36 years, and for the Senior Engineer post, it is 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for BEL Deputy Manager / Senior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The application fee for General, OBC, and EWS candidates is Rs. 600 plus 18% GST. No application fee is mentioned for other categories in the provided data.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Deputy Manager / Senior Engineer posts at BEL will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the BEL website and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for Deputy Manager and Senior Engineer roles?
faq.answer: The salary for Deputy Manager (E-IV) is Rs. 60,000-3%-1,80,000/-, and for Senior Engineer (E-III), it is Rs. 50,000-3%-1,60,000/-.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address for sending the offline application?
faq.answer: The application form should be sent to Manager (HR/MS/A&A/Seekers), Bharat Electronics Ltd., Jalahalli PO, Bengaluru - 560013. Please ensure the envelope is superscribed correctly.
